title: Amtech S1875 Set of Glitter Glue Gun Sticks in 6 Colours, 30 Pieces, 7x100mm for Hot Melt Crafting, Decorating and Bonding
features: QUICK SETTING: This 30 pack of 7mm x 100mm quick setting hot melt glue gun sticks is ideal for crafting, decorating and bonding objects
6 FUN COLOURS: The set comes in six colours: green, silver, red, yellow, blue and purple, for endless colourful bonding!
COMPATIBLE WITH: The sticks are compatible with Amtech's 10W glue gun (model number S1860)
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description The Amtech hot melt Glitter Glue Gun Sticks are quick setting and can be used for a variety of creative arts and crafts, including decorative card making and creating colourful hair accessories. You can also use the 7mm glue sticks for aspirational decorating and bonding purposes. The set includes 30 pieces of 6 different popular colours, which are silver, red, green, yellow, purple and blue. All 7mm x 100mm in size and compatible with Amtech S1860 10W glue gun, Amtech S1850 50W glue gun and Amtech S1845 35-80W Cordless Glue Gun. Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your hobby & craft requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service-see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products Safety Warning No
